basic_details.job_title: APSC Assistant Geologist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Assam Public Service Commission (APSC) Assistant Geologist Notification 2026 has been released on 11 June 2026 under Advt. No. 04/2026 on the official website of APSC. A total of 11 vacancies have been announced through the APSC Assistant Geologist Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 38 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years (upto 43 years); OBC/MOBC: 3 years (upto 41 years); PwBD: 10 years

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Geology / M.Sc. in Applied Geology / M.Sc. Tech in Applied Geology / M.Tech in Applied Geology / Integrated M.Sc. Tech in Applied Geology with at least Second Class (45%) from recognized University/Institution
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Geology, M.Sc. in Applied Geology, M.Sc. Tech in Applied Geology, M.Tech in Applied Geology and Integrated M.Sc. Tech in Applied Geology from any University or Institution recognized by the Government with at least Second Class (45%).

salary_details.details: Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 1,10,000/- + Rs. 12,700/- Grade Pay Per Month

selection_process: Screening Examination or Written Examination Interview / Viva-Voce
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of APSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download APSC Assistant Geologist Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the APSC Assistant Geologist Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the APSC Assistant Geologist Recruitment 2026 is 15th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Assistant Geologist post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a M.Sc. in Geology, Applied Geology, M.Sc. Tech in Applied Geology, M.Tech in Applied Geology, or an Integrated M.Sc. Tech in Applied Geology from a recognized university with at least a Second Class (45%).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 38 years as of 01-01-2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Geologist post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies announced for the Assistant Geologist post by the Assam Public Service Commission (APSC) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for APSC Assistant Geologist Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is Rs. 297.20, and for SC/ST candidates, it is Rs. 47.20. The fee can be paid online.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Geologist position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 1,10,000 per month, along with a Grade Pay of Rs. 12,700.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Assistant Geologist role?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Screening Examination or Written Examination followed by an Interview/Viva-Voce to assess the candidates' suitability for the post.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Assam apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification specifically mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Assam. It is advisable to check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification for any specific residency requirements.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the APSC Assistant Geologist Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official APSC recruitment portal. The application window is from 16-06-2026 to 15-07-2026. Ensure all details are accurate before submission.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It is recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
